patches.name: Force Developer Environment (Staging)
patches.description: Replaces the production environment variables with the developer/staging ones.

patches.name: Remove Firebase Tracking
patches.description: Removes Firebase App ID and Crashlytics API keys to disable Google tracking.

patches.name: Remove Google Maps API Key
patches.description: Removes the Google Maps API Key from the manifest (Breaks the interactive map but stops Google tracking).

patches.name: Remove Umami tracking
patches.description: Disables Umami tracking safely by modifying existing values.
